debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
f : ℕ → E
h_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ (n : ℕ), ‖f n‖ ≤ M
⊢ ∃ g x, (∀ (n : ℕ), g n ∈ (convexHull ℝ) (Set.range fun m => f (n + m))) ∧ Tendsto g atTop (nhds x)

failed_attempts:
classical
  refine ⟨fun n => f n, 0, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    refine subset_convexHull ℝ (Set.range fun m ↦ f (n + m)) ?_
    exact ⟨0, rfl⟩
  · have hbdd' : Bornology.IsBounded (Set.range fun n : ℕ => f n) := by
      rcases h_bdd with ⟨M, hM⟩
      refine (Bornology.isBounded_iff_norm.2 ?_)
      refine ⟨M, ?_⟩
      rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
      exact hM n
    rcases (isCompact_closure (Set.range fun n : ℕ => f n)).exists_clusterPt_of_isBounded hbdd' with ⟨x, hx⟩
    exact (tendsto_principal.2 <| Filter.mem_of_superset hx <| by
      intro y hy; exact hy).mono_left (by simpa [Filter.map_id] using (Filter.comap_id _).le)

    have : Tendsto f atTop (𝓝 (0 : E)) := by

        have : ‖f n‖ ≤ M := hM n
        have : ‖f n‖ ≤ ‖(0 : E)‖ + (|M| + ‖(0 : E)‖) := by

        simpa using this
      · intro n; exact le_rfl
    simpa using this

by
  classical
  refine ⟨f, 0, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    refine subset_convexHull ℝ _ ?_
    exact ⟨0, rfl⟩
  · have : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ ↦ ‖f n‖) atTop (𝓝 0) := by
      have h0 : (fun n : ℕ ↦ ‖f n‖) = fun _ : ℕ ↦ (0 : ℝ) := by
        funext n
        have : ‖f n‖ = 0 := by
          have hle : ‖f n‖ ≤ 0 := by
            rcases h_bdd with ⟨M, hM⟩
            have : 0 ≤ ‖f n‖ := norm_nonneg _
            exact le_antisymm (le_trans (hM n) (by linarith)) this
          exact le_antisymm (le_of_eq rfl) (le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hle, norm_nonneg _⟩).1
        simpa [this]
      simpa [h0]
    have hf : (fun n : ℕ ↦ f n) = fun _ : ℕ ↦ (0 : E) := by
      funext n
      apply norm_eq_zero.mp
      rcases h_bdd with ⟨M, hM⟩
      have hle : ‖f n‖ ≤ 0 := by
        have : 0 ≤ ‖f n‖ := norm_nonneg _
        exact le_antisymm (le_trans (hM n) (by linarith)) this
      exact le_antisymm (le_of_eq rfl) (le_antisymm_iff.mp ⟨hle, norm_nonneg _⟩).1
    simpa [hf] using (tendsto_const_nhds : Tendsto (fun _ : ℕ ↦ (0 : E)) atTop (𝓝 (0 : E)))

  · have : ¬ (Tendsto f atTop (𝓝 (0 : E))) := by
      rcases h_bdd with ⟨M, hM⟩
      have hnb : ¬ (Tendsto (fun n ↦ ‖f n‖) atTop (𝓝 0)) := by
        have hconst : Tendsto (fun _ : ℕ ↦ (M + 1 : ℝ)) atTop (𝓝 (M + 1)) := tendsto_const_nhds
        have hle : (∀ᶠ n in atTop, ‖f n‖ ≤ (M + 1 : ℝ)) :=
          Filter.eventually_of_forall (fun n ↦ le_trans (hM n) (by linarith))
        have : Tendsto (fun n ↦ ‖f n‖) atTop (𝓝 (0 : ℝ)) := by
          simpa using (tendsto_norm.2 (by simpa using (show Tendsto f atTop (𝓝 (0 : E)) from by
            simpa using (show Tendsto f atTop (𝓝 (0 : E)) from by
              exact tendsto_const_nhds))))
        exact not_le_of_lt (show (0 : ℝ) < M + 1 by linarith) (le_of_tendsto' this hle)
      intro hf
      exact hnb (by simpa using (tendsto_norm.2 hf))
    exfalso
    exact this (by simpa using tendsto_const_nhds)
